title: OSR — Skill Writer
description: Return schema for Skill Writer sub-agents. Typical size 1-3 KB. CRITICAL: every change in changes_applied must carry knowledge_source_refs pointing to specific lines in knowledge/*.md — this is the anti-overfitting contract. Empty knowledge_source_refs causes overfit_check.py to reject the change. A Skill Writer may produce an Anthropic-spec-compliant skill bundle (SKILL.md + optional references/*.md + scripts/*.py + PROVENANCE.yaml); list each file in skill_files and optionally summarize the bundle layout in skill_bundles.

skill_files.description: One entry per file produced in any skill bundle — the main SKILL.md, any references/*.md, any scripts/*, PROVENANCE.yaml, or other bundle assets. Use kind to disambiguate; section_headings is only meaningful for markdown files.

path.description: Bundle-relative or workspace-relative path, e.g. skills/<name>/SKILL.md or skills/<name>/references/<topic>.md.

kind.description: Optional. Defaults to skill_main when filename is SKILL.md, reference under references/, script under scripts/, asset under assets/, provenance for PROVENANCE.yaml.

section_headings.description: Markdown H1/H2 headings; only meaningful for .md files.

line_delta_vs_prev.description: Signed delta of line count vs previous skill tag.

skill_bundles.description: Optional bundle-level summary for multi-file skills. Each entry groups files under one skill directory. Orchestrator uses this to locate the main SKILL.md and decide what to publish via register_skill.py.

skill_dir.description: Directory relative to workspace root, e.g. skills/openjudge-grader-selection.

main.description: Path to the main SKILL.md, relative to skill_dir, i.e. "SKILL.md".

references.description: Paths relative to skill_dir, e.g. references/rubric-patterns.md.

index_file.description: Path to skills/index/SKILL.md if multi-skill output.

changes_applied.description: Itemized list of changes made in this iteration. Hard gate: every add/modify MUST have non-empty knowledge_source_refs.

rationale_short.description: WHY this change. overfit_check.py flags this field if it contains literal eval task ids.

knowledge_source_refs.description: Lines in knowledge/*.md that justify this change. MUST NOT be empty for type=add|modify. Empty array allowed only for type=delete.

excerpt_hash.description: Optional: sha256 of the cited text for later integrity check.

removed_lines.description: Total lines removed from all Skill files this iteration. Skill Writer is expected to actively remove stale content (simplicity principle).

diff_against_prev_tag.description: Optional path to a diff file vs the previous skill-v<N> tag, produced by git.

generalization_notes.description: Self-reported evidence that changes are generalizable, not patches for specific eval tasks.
